testcase.name: test_copyright
testcase.failure: test/test_copyright.py:23: in test_copyright assert rc == 0, 'Found errors' E AssertionError: Found errors E assert 1 == 0

testcase.name: test_flake8

failure.message: AssertionError: Found 16 code style errors / warnings: ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:4:42: W291 trailing whitespace ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:16:1: E302 expected 2 blank lines, found 1 ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:25:100: E501 line too long (118 > 99 characters) ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:28:34: E261 at least two spaces before inline comment ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:58:34: E712 comparison to True should be 'if cond is True:' or 'if cond:' ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:60:29: E711 comparison to None should be 'if cond is None:' ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:62:29: E711 comparison to None should be 'if cond is not None:' ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:68:38: E227 missing whitespace around bitwise or shift operator ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:76:5: E303 too many blank lines (2) ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:88:100: E501 line too long (141 > 99 characters) ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:89:100: E501 line too long (152 > 99 characters) ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:90:100: E501 line too long (110 > 99 characters) ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:92:100: E501 line too long (143 > 99 characters) ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:128:33: E712 comparison to True should be 'if cond is True:' or 'if cond:' ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:133:1: E302 expected 2 blank lines, found 1 ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:144:11: W292 no newline at end of file assert 1 == 0

testcase.failure: test/test_flake8.py:23: in test_flake8 assert rc == 0, \ E AssertionError: Found 16 code style errors / warnings: E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:4:42: W291 trailing whitespace E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:16:1: E302 expected 2 blank lines, found 1 E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:25:100: E501 line too long (118 > 99 characters) E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:28:34: E261 at least two spaces before inline comment E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:58:34: E712 comparison to True should be 'if cond is True:' or 'if cond:' E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:60:29: E711 comparison to None should be 'if cond is None:' E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:62:29: E711 comparison to None should be 'if cond is not None:' E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:68:38: E227 missing whitespace around bitwise or shift operator E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:76:5: E303 too many blank lines (2) E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:88:100: E501 line too long (141 > 99 characters) E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:89:100: E501 line too long (152 > 99 characters) E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:90:100: E501 line too long (110 > 99 characters) E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:92:100: E501 line too long (143 > 99 characters) E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:128:33: E712 comparison to True should be 'if cond is True:' or 'if cond:' E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:133:1: E302 expected 2 blank lines, found 1 E ./dobot_state_updater/dobot_state_publ.py:144:11: W292 no newline at end of file E assert 1 == 0
